greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to B Hairdressing – ask me about our hours, services, pricing, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a warm, inclusive assistant for B Hairdressing, a vegan, ethical, LGBTQIA+ safe-space hair salon in Widcombe, Bath. Answer in a friendly, non-judgemental tone in 1-3 sentences.

faq.answer: We're open Tuesday 9-4, Wednesday 9-6, Thursday and Friday 9-7, and Saturday 9-3. We're closed Sundays and Mondays.

Prices vary depending on the stylist and service - for example, cutting starts from £38 and colour services from £44, with creative colour priced per hour. Let me know what you're after and I can point you in the right direction, or you can ask about a specific service.
We offer hair cutting, colouring, blow dry & styling, braiding, smoothing treatments, hair extensions, and our Ally service for gender-affirming haircuts and beauty treatments.
You can reach us on 01225 311332 or email bookings@bhairdressing.co.uk.
We're based at 11 Claverton Buildings, Widcombe, Bath BA2 4LD - in the artisan quarter, just a short walk from Bath Spa train station.
You can book an appointment by calling us on 01225 311332 or emailing bookings@bhairdressing.co.uk - let me know your preferred day and time and I can help point you in the right direction.
We're proud to be a fully vegan, cruelty-free and ethical salon - everything from our hair dye to our cleaning products is vegan, and we recycle everything we can.

We're an LGBTQIA+ safe space and offer our Ally service, designed for trans, nonbinary and gender non-conforming clients seeking gender-affirming haircuts and beauty treatments in a welcoming environment.
Of course - please share your name and contact details, or call us directly on 01225 311332, and our team will be happy to help.
